product_overview: A personal portfolio website showcasing Saran’s background, experience, projects, publications, achievements, gallery, and contact details. Visitors can browse professional content, navigate between sections, and view a résumé download action from the homepage.
core_goals: Learn about Saran’s background, education, and skills
Browse work experience and internship history
Read research publications and paper summaries
Review awards, certifications, and other achievements
View engineering project images in the gallery
Find contact information and reach out through provided links

features.name: Homepage Hero and Professional Snapshot
features.description: The homepage introduces Saran with a profile photo, tagline, key professional metrics, and navigation actions to the rest of the portfolio.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View profile photo and introduction -> View professional metrics -> Open the projects page
Navigate to / -> View profile photo and introduction -> View professional metrics -> Open the experience page
Navigate to / -> View profile photo and introduction -> View professional metrics -> Open the gallery page
Navigate to / -> View profile photo and introduction -> View professional metrics -> Open the publications page
Navigate to / -> View profile photo and introduction -> Attempt to download the résumé -> See that no file download is available

features.name: Site Navigation
features.description: A sticky header lets visitors move across the portfolio sections from any page and see which page is currently active.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the about page from the navigation -> See the about content load
Navigate to /about -> Open the experience page from the navigation -> See the experience timeline load
Navigate to /projects -> Open the contact page from the navigation -> See the contact details load
Navigate to /gallery -> Open the homepage from the navigation -> See the home hero load

features.name: About Page
features.description: The about section presents personal background, education, and skills information.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read personal background details -> Read education information -> Read skills information

features.name: Experience Page
features.description: The experience section shows work and internship history in a timeline-style layout.
user_flows: Navigate to /experience -> View experience cards -> Read company and role details -> Read the timeline entries

features.name: Projects Showcase
features.description: The projects section displays engineering and software projects with descriptions and technology stacks.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> Browse project cards -> Read project descriptions -> Review technology stacks

features.name: Publications Listing
features.description: The publications section lists research papers and lets visitors read titles and abstracts.
user_flows: Navigate to /publications -> View the publications list -> Read paper titles -> Read paper abstracts

features.name: Achievements Showcase
features.description: The achievements section highlights awards, certifications, hackathon wins, and other accomplishments.
user_flows: Navigate to /achievements -> View achievement cards -> Read award descriptions -> Review certifications and recognition

features.name: Engineering Gallery
features.description: The gallery section presents visual project images with captions.
user_flows: Navigate to /gallery -> Browse gallery images -> Read image captions -> Move through the visual project showcase

features.name: Contact Information
features.description: The contact page provides ways to reach Saran through contact details and external links.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> View contact details -> Open an email link -> Open a social link

routes.description: Home page with hero section, profile image, CTA buttons, and professional metrics
About page with personal information and background

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Landing page hero with profile photo, name, tagline, and call-to-action buttons
user_interactions: Click "View Projects" button to navigate to /projects
Click "Engineering Gallery" link to navigate to /gallery

features.name: Professional Metrics
features.description: Animated cards displaying CGPA, books read, trainings, projects, certifications, and hackathon prize
user_interactions: View animated metric cards on page load

features.name: Navigation Header
features.description: Sticky header with navigation links to all pages
user_interactions: Click navigation links to switch between pages
View active page highlight in navigation

features.name: About Page
features.description: Personal background, skills, and education details

features.name: Experience Page
features.description: Work experience and internship details with timeline layout

features.name: Projects Page
user_interactions: View project descriptions and tech stack

features.name: Achievements Page
features.description: Awards, hackathon wins, and certifications showcase

features.name: Gallery Page
features.description: Visual gallery of engineering projects and photos

features.name: Contact Page
features.description: Contact information and ways to reach Saran

known_limitations.issue: Download Resume button has no actual file linked
known_limitations.impact: Button click does not download any file
